/usr/bin/cc CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/main.c.o -o main   -L/mnt/hgfs/Rk3568_Code/1_交叉开发/5_cmake/02-code/classtest/example6/./lib  -Wl,-rpath,/mnt/hgfs/Rk3568_Code/1_交叉开发/5_cmake/02-code/classtest/example6/./lib:/mnt/hgfs/Rk3568_Code/1_交叉开发/5_cmake/02-code/classtest/example6/build/lib lib/libadd.so lib/libsub.a
